basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Raebareli ACoE Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Raebareli (AIIMS Raebareli)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Raebareli (AIIMS Raebareli) has published the Assistant Controller of Examination Notification 2026 on 02 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Assistant Controller of Examination position. Candidates within the age range of up to 56 years and holding eligibility as Officers under Central/State/U.T. Governments, Universities, Statutory/Autonomous Bodies, or Research and Development Organizations holding analogous posts on a regular basis or having at least 5 years of regular service in PB-3 with Grade Pay of Rs. 5400 or higher are eligible to a

qualification.education_qualification: Officers under the Central/State /U.T. Governments/ Universities/ Statutory /Autonomous Bodies or Research and Development Organizations holding analogous posts on regular basis OR At least 5 years of regular service in the post in the PB 3, with Grade Pay of Rs. 5400 or higher. Desirable: Experience of working in Medical Institution.
qualification.details: Officers under the Central/State /U.T. Governments/ Universities/ Statutory /Autonomous Bodies or Research and Development Organizations holding analogous posts on regular basis OR At least 5 years of regular service in the post in the PB 3, with Grade Pay of Rs. 5400 or higher. Desirable: Experience of working in Medical Institution.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.aiimsrbl.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Raebareli Assistant Controller of Examination recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Assistant Controller of Examination post at AIIMS Raebareli is 17th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Controller of Examination post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Assistant Controller of Examination post will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 67700 - 208700 Per Month, corresponding to Level 11.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Assistant Controller of Examination post is 56 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Controller of Examination post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Assistant Controller of Examination at AIIMS Raebareli.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications required for the Assistant Controller of Examination post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be holding analogous posts on a regular basis under Central/State/UT Governments or equivalent organizations, or have at least 5 years of regular service in PB 3 with Grade Pay of Rs. 5400 or higher.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any desirable qualification for the post?
faq.answer: Yes, experience of working in a Medical Institution is considered a desirable qualification for the Assistant Controller of Examination post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test, followed by an Interview, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of AIIMS Raebareli, which is www.aiimsrbl.edu.in.
